popularStory.description: Diederik werd graaf van de Elzas en van Bouzonville, alsook voogd van de abdij van Remiremont en vanaf 1070 hertog van Opper-Lotharingen. Dit leidde tot een conflict met zijn jongere broer Gerard die …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"於1044年3月6日出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇時，他的父親Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz25歲，母親Hadwide de  Namur20歲。他於1075年與Hedwig von Formbach在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1115年12月30日享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"于1044年3月6日出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇时，他的父亲Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz25岁，母亲Hadwide de  Namur20岁。他于1075年与Hedwig von Formbach在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1115年12月30日享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Thierry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Germanic Theodoric, composed of elements meaning ‘people’ and ‘rule’. Compare Terry .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" was born on 6 March 1044, in Holy Roman Empire, his father, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, was 25 and his mother, Hadwide de  Namur, was 20. He married Hedwig von Formbach in 1075, in Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 30 December 1115, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" est né le 6 mars 1044, à Saint-Empire romain, son père, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hadwide de  Namur, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig von Formbach en 1075, à Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 décembre 1115, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" am 6. März 1044 in Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz 25 und seine Mutter Hadwide de  Namur 20. Er hat 1075 in Heiliges Römisches Reich Hedwig von Formbach geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. Dezember 1115 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" è nato il il 6 marzo 1044 nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Hadwide de  Namur, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Hedwig von Formbach nel 1075, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 dicembre 1115, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"が1044年3月6日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチで生まれた時，父Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metzは25歳，母Hadwide de  Namurは20歳であった。1075年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチでHedwig von Formbachと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1115年12月30日に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"(이)가 1044년 3월 6일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Hadwide de  Namur(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1075년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 Hedwig von Formbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1115년 12월 30일 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" nasceu em 6 de março de 1044, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hadwide de  Namur, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwig von Formbach em 1075, em Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1115, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" родился 6 марта 1044 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hadwide de  Namur, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig von Formbach в 1075 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 декабря 1115 г. в возрасте 71 год.

Se casó con Hedwig von Formbach en 1075, en Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1115, a la edad de 71 años.
